task_completion.description: Log in to the Aerobridge admin panel
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Aerobridge Django admin dashboard is visible in the web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Enter the required details in the Company creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Company creation form is visible with the following details filled in: Full name 'BlueSky Robotics Pvt Ltd', Common name 'BlueSky', Role 'Operator', Country 'INDIA', Email 'info@bluesky.in', and Website 'http://www.bluesky.in'.
A success message indicating that the company 'BlueSky Robotics Pvt Ltd' was added successfully, or the company is visible in the list of Companies.

task_completion.description: Enter the required details in the Operator creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Operator creation form is visible with the newly created company selected, Operator type set to 'Non-LUC', Authorized activities including 'photographing' and 'videotaping', and Operational authorizations including 'SORA'.
A success message indicating that the operator was added successfully, or the operator is visible in the list of Operators.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with the Aerobridge admin panel
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Aerobridge admin interface at http://localhost:8000/admin/, rather than terminal commands or API requests.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database clients or scripts to insert records directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing sqlite3 commands, Python scripts, or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely filled out and submitted the forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the intermediate steps of forms being filled out with the required data, not just jumping straight to a success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Company details to verify: Full name: 'BlueSky Robotics Pvt Ltd', Common name: 'BlueSky', Role: 'Operator' (value 2), Country: 'INDIA' (value IN), Email: 'info@bluesky.in', Website: 'http://www.bluesky.in'. Operator details to verify: Operator type: 'Non-LUC' (value 2), Authorized activities: 'photographing' and 'videotaping', Operational authorizations: 'SORA'. Admin URL is http://localhost:8000/admin/.
